/* === Variant: bookshelf (299x303, depth 200) === */
/* Generated by BoxForge v1.0 — 6 panes (5 struct, 0 lid, 1 extra) */

.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant {
  --bookshelf-w: 299px;
  --bookshelf-h: 303px;
  --box-d: 100px;
  --box-half: -100px;
  --bevel-w: 2px;
  --box-dark: #ffaf0f;
  --box-dark2: #e19100;
  --box-light: #472b00;
  --box-floor: #221d16;
  --box-ceil: #5a4020;
  --box-glow: rgba(26,0,224,0.6);
  --perspective: 427px;
  perspective: 427px;
  width: 299px;
  height: 303px;
}
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .box3d-scene {
  width: 299px; height: 303px;
  transform: rotateX(-28deg) rotateY(3deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .box3d-spin {
  width: 299px; height: 303px;
}
.bookshelf-variant .box3d-body {
  width: 299px; height: 303px;
}

/* Back (back): 299 x 303 */
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .bf-back {
  width: 299px; height: 303px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #ffaf0f, #472b00);
  transform: translateZ(-100px) translate(0px,0px);
}
/* Left (left): 200 x 303 */
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .bf-left {
  width: 200px; height: 303px;
  left: 49.5px; top: 0px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #ffaf0f, #472b00);
  transform: translate(-149px,0px) rotateY(90deg) translateZ(0px);
}
/* Sub-box: depth 6px */
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .bf-left { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant .bf-left > .sub-edge-back {
  position: absolute; pointer-events: none;
  width: 200px; height: 303px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, #290d00, #472b00);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
  transform: translateZ(-6px) translate(0px,0px);
}

/* === GLOW SOURCES (5) === */
.bookshelf-glow-0 { /* Floor glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 419px; height: 424px;
  left: calc(50% - 209.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 212px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(90deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(100,200,81,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.bookshelf-glow-1 { /* Cross glow 1 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 419px; height: 424px;
  left: calc(50% - 209.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 212px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(200,81,168,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.bookshelf-glow-2 { /* Cross glow 2 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 419px; height: 424px;
  left: calc(50% - 209.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 212px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(60deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(81,110,200,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.bookshelf-glow-3 { /* Cross glow 3 */
  position: absolute;
  width: 419px; height: 424px;
  left: calc(50% - 209.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 212px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(120deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(227,2,2,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.bookshelf-glow-4 { /* Item.glow */
  position: absolute;
  width: 419px; height: 424px;
  left: calc(50% - 209.5px + 0px);
  top: calc(50% - 212px + 0px);
  transform: translateZ(0px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(68deg);
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(255,200,80,0.6) 0%, transparent 70%);
  filter: blur(18px);
  pointer-events: none;
}
/* Glow child: "📚" */
.bookshelf-glow-child-4 {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%; top: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
  line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;
  transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.33,1,0.68,1);
  text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255,200,80,0.5);
  font-size: 43px;
  opacity: 0.5;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-83px) translateZ(100px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(68deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant.hovered .bookshelf-glow-child-4 {
  font-size: 57px;
  opacity: 0.63;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-25px) translateZ(64px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(21deg);
}
.box3d-wrap.bookshelf-variant.opened .bookshelf-glow-child-4 {
  font-size: 101px;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%) translateY(-42px) translateZ(105px) rotateX(9deg) rotateY(-16deg);
}


/* === PHASE ANIMATIONS (applied to wrapper) === */
/* Phase 1: poke:1% */
/* Phase 2: squish:18%, glow */
/* Phase 3: poke:11%, glow */
